name: Animation
desc: Only for levels with nothing that can hurt the player, basically for "animation levels"

name: Easy
desc: Very easily no hit but a hit can occur.

name: Normal
desc: At least one hit / death can occur.

name: Expert
desc: Challenges what the player is capable of with the game.

name: Master
desc: Reserved for the most difficult of all levels (e.g. hardest levels on the workshop). This difficulty can involve a specific mechanic that makes the level harder, like no rewinds, memory-based attacks, etc.
